Opinion Independence in the Digital World Project Scenario and Editing Workshop was Held

02.05.2023

Within the scope of the European Union Erasmus+ KA220 project, the "Scenario and Editing Workshop", which is the Turkey stage of the "Intellectual Independence in the Digital World Project" carried out under the coordination of Eyüp Kayhan, was held at our university between April 24 and 28.

In the Turkish phase of the project, which aims to hold workshops on different topics in Turkey, Spain, Italy and the Netherlands; training programs, workshops and talks were carried out in order to prepare a graduate education curriculum with the university-level curriculum preparation team and participant students about “being an influencer”, which has emerged as a new profession in social media.

During our “Scenario and Editing Workshop”; “Milli Yiyici”, “Tam Kararında”, Mesut Çevik, Doğan Kabak and “Kafalar” team were hosted as guest speakers. At the end of their speeches, plaques were presented to our guests by our Rector, Secretary General and BAP Coordinator.
